rows.protocol_note: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card dated 2026-06-25. Comparison values use recent model snapshots and may differ from launch values. The card often reports performance across reasoning-effort curves; only explicit table cells or exact prose values are normalized here. 52 expert-written protocols, three questions each, 156 total; 12 independent PhD experts for baseline.
